law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. He who intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment of eight days to six months and a fine of twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro] or with one of those penalties alone.
  In case the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment of one month to one year and a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

  Art. 399. If the blows or wounds cause an illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a consequence, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment of two months to two years and a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment of six months to three years and a fine of one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The penalty shall be imprisonment of two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if the blows or wounds result in an apparently incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a serious mutilation.
  The penalty shall be detention of five years to ten years if the offender acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the aim to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with detention of five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with detention of ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  CausesApparentlyIncurableDisease: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan: Person -> Bool
  CausesSeriousMutilation: Person -> Bool
  CausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Person -> Bool
  Premeditated: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt398: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt399: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt400: Person -> Bool
  punishedArt401: Person -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  !p in Person:
    punishedArt401(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows(p) & 
      ~Premeditated(p) &
      CausesDeath(p) .

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt401(p) <=> 
      IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows(p) & CausesDeath(p) .

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt400(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows(p) & 
      (
        CausesApparentlyIncurableDisease(p) | 
        CausesIncapacityMoreThanFourMonths(p) | 
        CausesCompleteLossOfUseOfOrgan(p) | 
        CausesSeriousMutilation(p)
      ) &
      ~punishedArt401(p) .

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt399(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(p) &
      ~punishedArt400(p) &
      ~punishedArt401(p) .

  !p in Person:
    punishedArt398(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictedWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      ~punishedArt399(p) &
      ~punishedArt400(p) &
      ~punishedArt401(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30 <=> punishedArt398(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365 <=> punishedArt398(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> punishedArt398(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt398(p) & Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 26 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 100 <=> punishedArt398(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180 <=> punishedArt399(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095 <=> punishedArt399(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 100 <=> punishedArt399(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> punishedArt399(p) & Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 50 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt399(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt400(p) & Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMinEuros(p) = 200 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    fineMaxEuros(p) = 500 <=> punishedArt400(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(p) & Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475 <=> punishedArt401(p) & Premeditated(p) .

  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825 <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
  !p in Person:
    imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650 <=> punishedArt401(p) & ~Premeditated(p) .
}

case.text: Anna and Bruno are cycling on a bike path. Bruno briefly looks back at his child and accidentally collides with Anna. Anna falls and has a minor bruise. There was no intent: Bruno acted accidentally. Anna is able to function normally again the same day.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Bruno is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
No. Anna is not punished under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
